{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113052496002CF720286ED8DE2A"}"},"total":158},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7304959894942450495","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的巨好看 从盗墓那本看来的 每一次看完一本书我都会有一种孤独感 落寞感 但又很开心 因为他们终于有了好结局 但是我再也看不到他们的故事了 真的很喜欢九九和乐川的故事 希望他们会在另一个世界一直一直幸福下去吧 会永远幸福的 对于我来说 每一次看一本小说 他们都是有血有肉的 不是纸片人 从来都不是 他们会永远幸福下去 我也会好好的过好我的生活的 再见啦各位 下次大大再出新书我还来喔[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700819950,"group_id":"7250103989499333644","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"你能否像红绿灯一样准时出现？","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1DzbiRyydfup8fhr8e5NSM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/013dc42ac7584de5b277451f418b221e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618828&x-signature=ZA75A9%2FMKUDOTQ3IZTbwazKJXB0%3D","user_id":"100153197863","user_name":"发烧药"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100153197863","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7250103989499333644","book_info":{"abstract":"神棍女帝+无敌国师+双强
【简介：（九川后续篇）】
开局成为女帝。
没政权，没兵权，连帝印也被拿了。
她只能入江湖，不断提升境界，意图有天修道为神。
最后，发现自己真的是神。
她本为天界神明，转世的任务就是为抹杀国师。
国师？
那个坐在自己对面喝茶，长相冠绝天下，桃花眼看着自己爱意能溺出来的少年。
不干，坚决不干。
这任务谁想干谁干。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oaf7301316fba239022d2e2f5bba4ebd5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"马由頁","author_id":"","book_id":"7250103989499333644","book_name":"别惹国师，他又在自我攻略","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7251144926451696187","read_count":"251","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"200806"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"95","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e7e9151c7caadab566d2ce2fa8493fb9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253525&x-signature=2%2FkwpF25%2F2ew6hjFN4NsgKDJ%2FMY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2902303488084461","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.061515e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113052496002CF720286ED8DE2A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":29,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10615,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1561},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1700822271,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7267811619165061945","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从作者大大
